description_for_human: Macro market intelligence — regime tracking, indicators, briefs, narratives, and scored predictions across crypto, equities, and commodities.
description_for_model: AgentCanary provides macro market intelligence. Use it to get the current market regime (expansion/stagflation/recession), risk gauge (0-100), 36 proprietary indicators (Bull Market Support Band, Pi Cycle, Wyckoff Structure, Stablecoin Composite, CAPE ratio, Hindenburg omen + 30 more), narrative momentum scores, whale alerts, forward scenario analysis with price targets, and scored prediction accuracy. 121 endpoints covering crypto, equities, commodities, and forex. 4 daily AI briefs. Wallet-based auth, USDC/USDT deposits.
